verses.text: Biakinn panin Jesuh a pusuah laitakin a nungzuite khat in, “Sia aw, hih biakinnte bangzah takin lian a, a suangte bangzah takin gol ahi hiam?” a ci hi

Jesuh in, “Hih innte liansa-in thupi na sa mahmah hi. Ahi zongin hih innte lamna-a a kiciang suangte nih bek nangawn a kithuapna a omlo zah dongin a kiphelkek gawp hun hong tung ding hi,” ci-in a dawng hi.
Biakinn galkhatah a om Oliv Mual tungah Jesuh tu-in a om laitakin Peter, James, Johan, leh Andru hong pai-in amauteng guak a om laitakin
“Hih na thugen cik ciangin hong tung ding a, hih na thugente khempeuh hong tun'ding ciangin bang lim hong om ding ahi hiam?” ci-in a dong uh hi
Jesuh in amaute kiangah, “Kuamah in hong khem zawhlohna dingin na kidawm un
Keima min pua-in mi tampi hong pai ding uh a, ‘Keimah, Khrih ka hi hi,’ ci-in mi tampi a khemzo ding uh hi
A gamla-a galkidona thute leh a nai-a galkidona huging na zak uh ciangin patau kei un. Tuate a piang ding mah hi a, hun beina ding hi nailo hi
Minam khat leh minam khat, kumpi khat leh kumpi khat kido ding uh hi. Mun tuamtuamah zin hong ling ding a, kial zong hong tung ding hi. Hihte khempeuh pen gimna kipatna hi pan hi
“Limtakin kidawm un. Note hong kimanin thukhen zumah hong kipaipih ding a, kikhopna inn sungah zong hong kisat ding hi. Ukpite leh kumpite mai-ah keima thu genna ding hun na ngah ding uh hi
Ahi zongin hun beina a tun' ma-in mi khempeuh tungah Lungdamna Thu kihilh masa phot ding hi

Note hong kimanin, thusitna a thuak dingin thukhen zumah hong kipaipih ciangin bang gen ding ihi hiam, ci-in ma lunghihmawh kei un. A thugen ding pen note hiloin Kha Siangtho ahih manin a hun tak ciangin na gen dingun a hong kisawl peuhpeuh na gen un
Unau khatlekhat a sihna dingun kikhia ding uh a, pa in a ta khia-in, ta in a nu leh a pate khia-in a thatsak ding uh hi
Keima hangin Gentail mi khempeuh in note hong mudah ding uh a, ahi zongin a sih dongun a thuakzote in hotkhiatna a ngah ding uh hi.
“Ama omlohna dingpi-ah a lipkhaphuai zehphitna a hong om na muh uh ciangin (hih lai a simte in Jesuh' cihnopna thei ta un!) Judea gama om mite mualtungah tai un
A innkhum zangah a om laitak ahi khate zong, a kumsuk ciangin a neihsate a taipih dingin a la dingin a innsungah lut nawn kei hen
Lolai-ah a om laitak ahi khate zong, a puan la dingin a inn uh zuan nawn kei hen
Tua laitakin nupi naupaite leh naungek neite-a' dingin haksa mahmah ding hi
Phalbi laitakin hih thu hong pian'khak lohna dingin thu na ngen un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Pasian in leitung a pian'sak cila kipanin tuhun dong, cikmahin tua bang haksatna a om ngeilo, nidang ciangin zong a om ngei nawnlo ding, tua hun laitakin hong tung ding hi
Topa in tua gimna hun a ni khiamlo hi leh a suaktazo kuamah omlo ding hi. Ahi zongin ama teel mite a khualna-in a ni a khiam hi
“Tua laitakin mi khatpeuh in, ‘Hih lai-ah Khrih om hi; hua lai-ah Khrih om hi,’ ci-in hong gen leh, um kei un
Bang hang hiam cih leh Khrih kineihkhemte leh kamsang kineihkhemte hong piang ding a, ahihzawh leh, a teelsa mite nangawn a khemna dingun lim leh na lamdangte hong bawl ding uh hi
Tua ahih manin kidawm un! A hun ma-in kong genkhin hi.
“Tua haksatna hun khit ciangin ni hong mial ding a, kha hong taang nawnlo ding hi
Van panin aksite hong kia ding a, vantunga om nate a omngei bangin omthei nawnlo ding hi
Tua ciangin Mihing Tapa, vangliatna leh minthan'na tawh meii lakah a hong paisuk kimu ding hi
Tua ciangin leitung mun khempeuhah vantung mite sawl ding a, leimong khat pan mong khat kikalah a om a teel mite khempeuh a kaikhawmsak ding hi.
Thei kung tung pana thupiang panin thu thei un. A hiangte hong meeng a, a teh hong no ciangin khuakhal hun hong naita ding hi, ci-in na thei un
Tua mah bangin hih thute hong tun' ciangin amah hong naita a, hong tung dektak hi, ci-in na thei un
Hih thu limtakin phawk un. Tu laitakin a nungta mi khempeuh a sihkhit ma-in hih thute hong tung ding hi
Van leh lei mangthang ding a, ahi zongin ka thugente mangthang ngeilo ding hi.

sections.sectionTitle: A Ni leh A Nai Hun Kuamah'n Theilo

verses.text: “Ahi zongin tua ni leh tua nai hun ding kuamah in theilo hi. Vantunga om vantung mite ahi a, Tapa ahi keimah in ahi zongin ka thei kei a, ka Pa bek in a thei hi
Tua hun ding theilo na hih manun kikemin pilvang un
Mi khat khualzin dingin paikhia a, a din'khiat ding ciangin amau' sep ding ciat a nasemte tungah tavuan pia a, kongcingpa in limtakin a cin' ding a sawl mipa tawh kibang hi
Inn neipa, nitak ahi a, zankim ahi a, zingsang ak khuan'kuan ahi a, zingsang khuavak khit ahi zongin a bang hunin hong tungding cih theilo na hih manun ngakin na pilvang un
Tua hi kei leh amah thakhatin hong tungin na ihmut laitakun hong tuakkha ding hi
Note tungah kong gen mah bangin mi khempeuh tungah zong, ‘Ngakin na pilvang un,’ ka ci hi,” a ci hi.
